The '''WW-676 repulsorlift sled''' was a two-man [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] vehicle which could be used as a weapons platform, primarily as part of the [[MobileMortar-3]] system.<ref name="EGWT" />

The [[Hoversled/Legends|sled]] was powered by an [[X-7a repulsor engine]] with four integrated thrust vectors and a secondary [[XA7 drive unit]] located underneath the [[Gunner/Legends|gunner's]] chair. These, combined with dual [[Steering vane/Legends|steering vanes]] located beneath the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], gave the sled tremendous speed and maneuverability and allowed it to perform elaborate mid air maneuvers in order to avoid enemy fire. These advantages came at a price however, as the sled lacked any [[Armor/Leegends|armor]] and could be severely damaged by even a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] bolt. A frequent tactic then was to fly as close to the ground as possible before coming up abruptly to give the gunner a clean shot.<ref name="EGWT" />

When mounting the [[MM-s3 grenade launcher]], an ammunition locker located beneath the pilot's seat could hold up to five hundred [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] and reload the launcher through a connecting tube. Another popular variant replaced the launcher with an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]] and its power unit.<ref name="EGWT" />

Since its first introduction during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], the WW-676 was used by both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in addition to planetary defense forces. They were often issued as support weapons for [[Army/Legends|army]] [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]], or operated in units of four vehicles as light mechanized infantry.<ref name="a&eg" />
